column23: "Play as tight as you want, Mike"
"Ooooooh, but I have a prime number of outs!"
"Oh man! I caught some of that $hit!"
"I definitely should not be in this hand. I'm really hard to kill BTW."
"Un-&^%$%-ing Believeable! How do you get there… Every Time!?"
"Tournament Poker, Yee-Haw. Yep, it's a skill game."
"Oh man, there's $400 on my table in the kitchen. Time to shove."
"But, I don't like it when you call."
I should probably look at my cards first.
